name: codetruss
description: Catch scope drift and AI slop before commit with local acceptance receipts.

interface.shortDescription: Catch scope drift and AI slop before commit
interface.longDescription: Bind agent changes to the task, run deterministic local checks, and produce a verifiable receipt before commit.
defaultPrompt: Set up CodeTruss for this repository
Review my current changes against the task
Verify and explain my latest CodeTruss receipt
